svg.title: Claims RAG architecture — Llama 3.3 70B routing agent with NL-to-SQL and hybrid retrieval paths merging at agent synthesizer
svg.desc: Top-down flow diagram. User prompt feeds a Llama 3.3 70B routing agent which branches into two paths: Path A goes through an NL-to-SQL engine to a SQLite database; Path B goes through a hybrid retriever splitting into ChromaDB and BM25 which merge at a Reciprocal Rank Fusion node. Both paths converge at an agent synthesizer which outputs an answer with citations.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the routing agent decide which path to send a user query down?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement the Llama 3.3 70B routing agent to classify queries between SQL and vector search?')
sendPrompt('How do I build the NL-to-SQL engine using an open source LLM for the claims SQLite database?')
sendPrompt('How does the hybrid retriever combine ChromaDB vector search and BM25 keyword search?')
sendPrompt('How do I structure the SQLite database schema for claims structured data in the RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up ChromaDB with sentence-transformer embeddings for claims documents?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up BM25 keyword search alongside ChromaDB for the hybrid retriever?')
sendPrompt('How does Reciprocal Rank Fusion merge ChromaDB and BM25 results? Show me the implementation.')
sendPrompt('How does the agent synthesizer combine the SQL result and the RRF-ranked chunks to generate the final answer?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement source citation in the final answer so consultants can trace which document each fact came from?')
